# PR_DIFF_V1
FILE services/auth.py
HUNK @@ -18,10 +18,13 @@ def login(request, user_store, session_store):
BOTH  18 | def login(request, user_store, session_store):
BOTH  19 |     username = request.json.get("username")
BOTH  20 |     password = request.json.get("password")
LEFT  21 |     user = user_store.find_by_username(username)
LEFT  22 |     if not user or not verify_password(password, user.password_hash):
LEFT  23 |         return {"error": "invalid credentials"}, 401
RIGHT 21 |     user = user_store.find_by_username(username)
RIGHT 22 |     if user is None:
RIGHT 23 |         return {"error": "invalid credentials"}, 401
RIGHT 24 |     if password != user.password_hash:
RIGHT 25 |         return {"error": "invalid credentials"}, 401
BOTH  26 |
LEFT  24 |     token = session_store.create(user.id, ttl_seconds=3600)
RIGHT 27 |     token = session_store.create(user.id)
BOTH  28 |     return {"token": token}, 200
END_FILE

FILE services/reporting.py
HUNK @@ -42,8 +42,13 @@ def build_report(rows, filters):
BOTH  42 | def build_report(rows, filters):
BOTH  43 |     results = []
BOTH  44 |     for row in rows:
LEFT  45 |         if row["status"] not in filters.statuses:
LEFT  46 |             continue
RIGHT 45 |         if filters.statuses and row["status"] not in filters.statuses:
RIGHT 46 |             continue
RIGHT 47 |         if filters.expression:
RIGHT 48 |             if not eval(filters.expression, {}, row):
RIGHT 49 |                 continue
BOTH  50 |         results.append(row)
LEFT  47 |     return results
RIGHT 51 |     return sorted(results, key=lambda row: row["created_at"])
END_FILE

FILE web/upload_handler.py
HUNK @@ -8,9 +8,13 @@ def save_upload(request, storage):
BOTH   8 | def save_upload(request, storage):
BOTH   9 |     uploaded_file = request.files["file"]
LEFT  10 |     filename = secure_filename(uploaded_file.filename)
LEFT  11 |     if not filename:
LEFT  12 |         return {"error": "missing filename"}, 400
RIGHT 10 |     filename = uploaded_file.filename
RIGHT 11 |     if filename == "":
RIGHT 12 |         return {"error": "missing filename"}, 400
RIGHT 13 |     destination = f"/tmp/uploads/{filename}"
RIGHT 14 |     uploaded_file.save(destination)
RIGHT 15 |     storage.put(filename, open(destination, "rb").read())
LEFT  13 |     storage.put(filename, uploaded_file.read())
BOTH  16 |     return {"ok": True}, 201
END_FILE
